description_long: This is a modern, rectangular couch upholstered in a muted teal fabric, featuring a clean and minimalist design. The seat consists of a single, long cushion with a grid of subtle tufting, while the backrest is divided into two large, plush cushions that provide ample support. Two cylindrical bolster pillows rest against the straight, boxy armrests, which are the same height as the backrest and have a squared-off profile. The couch sits on short, barely visible legs, giving it a low-profile appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns aside from the tufting on the seat. The overall look is contemporary and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern teal couch with tufted seat, two large back cushions, and straight armrests, featuring a minimalist, boxy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two back cushions, tufted seat, and both armrests with bolster pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight armrest, the thickness of the seat and back cushions, and the low-profile legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth backrest and the overall rectangular shape of the couch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and subtle leg visibility.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One long, tufted seat cushion; two large, loose back cushions; two cylindrical bolster pillows at each end; all cushions are visually separate and not integrated.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid teal fabric with a grid of subtle tufting on the seat cushion; no visible decorative stitching or motifs.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style legs, mostly hidden from view, likely made of dark wood or metal, providing a low-profile base.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with squared edges and upholstered in the same fabric; each armrest features a cylindrical bolster pillow.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, divided backrest with two large, loose cushions; backrest is plush and not tufted, providing a continuous but segmented appearance.
